recent_news.title: Presence or Capacity? The Coast Guard Can Have Both Through Small Boat Stations
recent_news.summary: Closing small boat stations has proven difficult. Leaving them unchanged is operationally inefficient. These units are enduring parts of the Coast Guard’s force structure, yet their full potential is not always realized. recent_news.title: Apple taps John Ternus as CEO to replace Tim Cook, who will become chairman
recent_news.summary: Apple said on Monday that John Ternus is succeeding Tim Cook as CEO, with Cook assuming the role of executive chairman on Sept. 1.
recent_news.body_text:
Apple said on Monday that John Ternus is succeeding Tim Cook as CEO, with Cook assuming the role of executive chairman on Sept. 1. Ternus, a senior vice president of hardware engineering, will join Apple's board of directors when he becomes chief. Apple's nonexecutive chairman Arthur Levinson will become the iPhone maker's lead independent director at that time.

general_news.title: How This Precision Weapon Reengineered Modern War
general_news.summary: This exclusive Cogs of War interview is with Jeffrey E. Stern, an award-winning journalist and author of the newly released The Warhead: The Quest to Build the Perfect Weapon in the Age of Modern Warfare, which details the development of Paveway, the precision-guided bomb. We asked him to share his thoughts on the bomb’s history and its role in air campaigns, and the relationship between government, science, and industry.
